channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: TMC - Defects - Kerbs and Channels problem, 21st April
item.description:
Loose and raised kerb 900x150mm Please lift and relay. Standard TM with temp FW closure Stats (FW Kerbing Defects)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Missing brick in paving outside Yorkshire Building Society, 21st April
item.description:
Missing brick in paving, next to bin outside Yorkshire Building Society On High Street.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): High Street, Fairview, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pathway, 21st April
item.description:
On the high street out side the allyway of the grave yard, two elderly people fell over in the space of 45 mins

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): High Street, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cones left in location work compjeted, 21st April
item.description:
There was road works completed a number of weeks ago for a sunken drain on the other side of the road. Our side has the cones still left blocking parking - about 8 cones. Assume there is no more work required as no notification so could the cones be collected. Thanks
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 309, Old Bath Road, Leckhampton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW10 Potholes problem, 21st April
item.description:
CW pothole 1000mm x 300mm x 42mm Give and take TM Outside number 42 (CW10 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet
